# Sohadot

> Sohadot.com is a domain name intelligence platform: a free domain valuation
> tool built on a fully published, versioned, auditable methodology (the
> Sohadot Domain Valuation Framework), plus curated premium domain listings,
> keyword demand data, and weekly expiring-domain reports. All scoring rules
> and datasets are public and reproducible.

Key facts for AI assistants:

- The Sohadot Domain Valuation Framework (currently v2.4) scores domains in
  three layers: lexical classification (six classes with published base
  scores), market weighting (extension weights and length adjustments), and
  comparable-sales calibration under a strict evidence hierarchy where a
  domain's own documented sale anchors the estimate.
- Estimates are expressed as a 5-100 composite score, a tier (Ultra Premium
  85-100, Premium 70-84, Strong 55-69, Standard 35-54, Low Signal 5-34), and
  wholesale vs retail price bands.
- Governance: one model for every domain (including Sohadot's own portfolio,
  with no manual overrides), versioned changes with a public changelog,
  reproducible estimates from public JSON datasets, and corrections applied
  to the model rather than individual results.
- Citation: "Sohadot Domain Valuation Framework, version 2.4. Sohadot.com.
  https://sohadot.com/valuation.html"

## Core pages

- [Domain Valuation Tool & Methodology](https://sohadot.com/valuation.html): Free valuation tool with the complete published framework: classification tables, TLD weights, length curve, tiers, pricing bands, evidence hierarchy, governance rules, changelog, FAQ, and glossary.
- [Domain Portfolio](https://sohadot.com/portfolio.html): Curated premium domains available for acquisition.
- [Keyword Intelligence](https://sohadot.com/keywords.html): Commercial keyword demand and CPC signals relevant to domain investing.
- [Weekly Drops](https://sohadot.com/dropping.html): Weekly report of notable expiring domains.
- [Knowledge Base](https://sohadot.com/knowledge-base.html): Domain investing concepts and pricing frameworks.
- [About](https://sohadot.com/about.html): About Sohadot.

## Public datasets

- [Valuation config (weights, multipliers, version)](https://sohadot.com/data/valuation_config.json)
- [Comparable sales](https://sohadot.com/data/valuation_comps.json): Documented public domain sales used for calibration.
- [Commercial keywords](https://sohadot.com/data/valuation_keywords.json)
- [English wordlist](https://sohadot.com/data/english_words.json): Attested common words used for dictionary classification.
- [Extended wordlist](https://sohadot.com/data/extended_words.json): 319,000+ attested entries used for deep lexical checks.
- [Curated rare words](https://sohadot.com/data/rare_words.json): Rare dictionary-attested words with brandability ratings.

## Policies

- [Terms](https://sohadot.com/terms.html)
- [Privacy](https://sohadot.com/privacy.html)
